mapper.select:
SELECT ccv.`title` as targetViewName, ccv.id as target_view_id, ccv.type as target_view_type, ccv.table_id, vl.source_view_id as sourceViewId, (case when vl.target_view_id is null then 0 else vl.linkage_active end) as linkageActive, vlf.source_field, vlf.target_field FROM core_chart_view ccv LEFT JOIN core_visualization_linkage vl ON ccv.id = vl.target_view_id AND vl.dv_id = #{dvId} AND vl.source_view_id = #{sourceViewId} LEFT JOIN core_visualization_linkage_field vlf ON vl.id = vlf.linkage_id where ccv.type != 'VQuery' and ccv.id in
#{targetViewId}

SELECT ccv.`title` as targetViewName, ccv.id as target_view_id, ccv.type as target_view_type, ccv.table_id, vl.source_view_id as sourceViewId, (case when vl.target_view_id is null then 0 else vl.linkage_active end) as linkageActive, vlf.source_field, vlf.target_field FROM core_chart_view_snapshot ccv LEFT JOIN core_visualization_linkage_snapshot vl ON ccv.id = vl.target_view_id AND vl.dv_id = #{dvId} AND vl.source_view_id = #{sourceViewId} LEFT JOIN core_visualization_linkage_field_snapshot vlf ON vl.id = vlf.linkage_id where ccv.type != 'VQuery' and ccv.id in
#{targetViewId}

select core_dataset_field.id, core_dataset_field.dataset_table_id, core_dataset_field.origin_name, core_dataset_field.`name`, core_dataset_field.field_type from core_dataset_field where dataset_group_id = #{table_id}

select core_dataset_field.id, core_dataset_field.dataset_table_id, core_dataset_field.origin_name, core_dataset_field.`name`, core_dataset_field.field_type from core_dataset_field left join core_chart_view on core_dataset_field.dataset_table_id= core_chart_view.table_id where core_chart_view.id = #{viewId}
mapper.delete:
delete from core_visualization_linkage where core_visualization_linkage.dv_id = #{dvId}
AND core_visualization_linkage.source_view_id = #{sourceViewId}

delete from core_visualization_linkage_snapshot where core_visualization_linkage_snapshot.dv_id = #{dvId}
AND core_visualization_linkage_snapshot.source_view_id = #{sourceViewId}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
TO_CHAR(vl.source_view_id) || '#' || TO_CHAR(vlf.source_field) AS sourceInfo, TO_CHAR(vl.target_view_id) || '#' || TO_CHAR(vlf.target_field) AS targetInfo
CONCAT( vl.source_view_id, '#', vlf.source_field ) AS sourceInfo, CONCAT( vl.target_view_id, '#', vlf.target_field ) AS targetInfo
FROM core_visualization_linkage vl LEFT JOIN core_chart_view ccv ON vl.source_view_id = ccv.id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_linkage_field vlf ON vl.id = vlf.linkage_id WHERE vl.dv_id = #{dvId} AND ccv.linkage_active = 1 AND vl.linkage_active = 1 AND vlf.id IS NOT NULL

SELECT DISTINCT
TO_CHAR(vl.source_view_id) || '#' || TO_CHAR(vlf.source_field) AS sourceInfo, TO_CHAR(vl.target_view_id) || '#' || TO_CHAR(vlf.target_field) AS targetInfo
CONCAT( vl.source_view_id, '#', vlf.source_field ) AS sourceInfo, CONCAT( vl.target_view_id, '#', vlf.target_field ) AS targetInfo
FROM core_visualization_linkage_snapshot vl LEFT JOIN core_chart_view_snapshot ccv ON vl.source_view_id = ccv.id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_linkage_field_snapshot vlf ON vl.id = vlf.linkage_id WHERE vl.dv_id = #{dvId} AND ccv.linkage_active = 1 AND vl.linkage_active = 1 AND vlf.id IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO core_visualization_linkage ( id, dv_id, source_view_id, target_view_id, update_time, update_people, linkage_active, ext1, ext2, copy_from, copy_id ) SELECT
RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())
UUID()
AS id, pv_source_copy.t_dv_id AS dv_id, pv_source_copy.t_chart_view_id AS source_view_id, pv_target_copy.t_chart_view_id target_view_id, update_time, update_people, linkage_active, ext1, ext2, id as copy_from, #{copyId} as copy_id FROM core_visualization_linkage INNER JOIN ( SELECT pvs.scene_id AS s_dv_id, pvs.id AS s_chart_view_id, pvt.scene_id AS t_dv_id, pvt.id AS t_chart_view_id FROM core_chart_view pvt inner JOIN core_chart_view pvs ON pvt.copy_from = pvs.id WHERE pvt.copy_id = #{copyId} ) pv_source_copy ON core_visualization_linkage.dv_id = pv_source_copy.s_dv_id AND core_visualization_linkage.source_view_id = pv_source_copy.s_chart_view_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT pvs.scene_id AS s_dv_id, pvs.id AS s_chart_view_id, pvt.scene_id AS t_dv_id, pvt.id AS t_chart_view_id FROM core_chart_view pvt inner JOIN core_chart_view pvs ON pvt.copy_from = pvs.id WHERE pvt.copy_id = #{copyId} ) pv_target_copy ON core_visualization_linkage.dv_id = pv_target_copy.s_dv_id AND core_visualization_linkage.target_view_id = pv_target_copy.s_chart_view_id

INSERT INTO core_visualization_linkage_field ( id, linkage_id, source_field, target_field, update_time, copy_from, copy_id ) SELECT
RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())
uuid()
AS id, pvlf_copy.t_id, source_field, target_field, update_time, id AS copy_from, #{copyId} AS copy_id FROM core_visualization_linkage_field INNER JOIN ( SELECT id AS t_id, copy_from AS s_id FROM core_visualization_linkage WHERE copy_id = #{copyId} ) pvlf_copy ON core_visualization_linkage_field.linkage_id = pvlf_copy.s_id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM core_visualization_linkage_field WHERE linkage_id IN ( SELECT id FROM core_visualization_linkage WHERE dv_id = #{dvId} );
